reference: Hi, thank you for asking. I appreciate your concern. If I were your doctor, then I would treat this case with the following medications: one) Tablet erythromycin five hundred milligrams three times a day for seven days; two) Povidone ointment for local application. I hope this information helps. Have a good day.
text: Hi, thank you for asking. I appreciate your concern. If I were your doctor, then I would treat this case with the following medications: one, Tabwat Erythromycin five hundred milligrams three times a day for seven days. Two, Cuvadon ointment for local application. I hope this information helps. Have a good day.
